{"step_by_step_thinking": "Based on the provided documents, rosettes are mentioned in relation to embryonal tumors, particularly in the context of PNET and medulloblastoma. Document [4] mentions that medulloblastomas are embryonal tumors but have their own genetically and histologically defined groups.
